topbar.workspaceSubtitle: Ledgers, budgets, notifications, exports, and billing all start here.
topbar.upgradeDescription: Check billing status and unlock exports, notifications, and later platform features.
topbar.ledgerDescription: Ledger centre is now connected, and later platform pages will default to this ledger context.
topbar.ledgerDescriptionWithRole: Current role: {role}. Budgets, notifications, exports, and search will default to this ledger.
topbar.agreementDescription: Please confirm you have read and understood the terms below before using the app.
topbar.privacyDescription: The following content explains how the app handles and protects your data.

connection.detailConnected: Notifications and state updates are active
connection.detailError: Realtime notifications are currently unavailable. Refresh again shortly to retry.
connection.detailIdle: Realtime notification connection has not been established yet

loginPage.heroTitle: Keep your finances in motion after sign-in
loginPage.heroDescription: Capture records, apply filters, analyse charts, and export data in one place. The sign-in view now follows the same visual language as the main product.

workspace.label: Single entry
workspace.description: Sign in and continue inside one accounting, filtering, and analysis workspace.

capability.label: Core tools
capability.description: Records, filters, charts, and exports now form one connected workflow.

access.label: Access modes
access.description: Username/password and Google sign-in are both supported.

highlights.flowDescription: Create, filter, inspect, and review details without jumping between mismatched screens.
highlights.categoryDescription: Category id and category name are now separated, making later linking and editing more stable.

loginPage.welcomeDescription: Sign in to continue using your accounting workspace, charts, and export tools.
loginPage.redirectHint: After sign-in you will continue to: {path}
loginPage.ctaDescription: Signing in restores your records, filters, and notification state.
loginPage.createAccountDescription: Fill in the basics to enter the accounting app, then refine your setup over time.
registerHighlights: Enter the accounting workspace right away
Track categories and time periods later
Keep using exports and billing entry points
loginPage.submitDescription: After submitting, return to sign-in and use the new account to enter the workspace.

messages.loginFailed: Sign-in failed. Please try again later.
messages.logoutFailed: Sign-out failed. Please try again later.
messages.registerFailed: Registration failed. Please try again later.

validation.usernameRange: Username must be between 3 and 50 characters
validation.passwordRange: Password must be between 6 and 255 characters
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.firstNameRange: First name must not exceed 50 characters
validation.lastNameRange: Last name must not exceed 50 characters
validation.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number

accounting.heroDescription: Keep quick entry, filtering, and trend analysis on one screen. The top summary shows the full dataset while filters focus the detail list.
accounting.recentUpdateHint: Date of the most recent record
accounting.filtersActiveHint: Charts and top summaries still show the full dataset while the detail area focuses on the filtered result.
accounting.quickEntryDescription: Capture today's income or expense quickly.
accounting.filterDescription: Use category and type to locate the records you need.

summary.incomeHint: Accumulated value of all income records
summary.expenseHint: Accumulated value of all expense records
summary.countHintActive: Records matched by the current filters

form.recordTypeDescription: Switching between income and expense also refreshes the available categories.
form.amountHint: Supports two decimals and will be normalised before submission.
form.dateHint: Defaults to today, but you can also backfill older records.
form.categoryDescription: Choose the category that best matches this record.
form.categoryEmpty: No categories exist for this type yet. Add one first.
form.categoryPrompt: There are no selectable categories yet. Add a {type} category to continue.
form.notePlaceholder: Add context for this record, such as the scenario, merchant, or payment method.
form.incompleteWarning: Please complete the record before saving

filter.title: Quick filters
filter.description: Pick a type first, then narrow the result with categories.
filter.categoryPending: Choose a type to enable category filters
filter.pickTypeFirst: Choose expense or income first, then narrow down to a specific category.
filter.noCategories: There are no categories for this type yet. Add one from the left panel first.
filter.chartHint: Tip: click a slice in the chart on the right to filter the detail list to that expense category.

list.title: Record details
list.description: Review, edit, and export the current filtered result.
list.emptyDescription: Add a record first, or adjust the filters on the left and try again.
list.noExportData: There is no data to export
list.exportFailed: Export failed. Please try again later.

charts.title: Insights
charts.description: This area shows expense mix, time trends, and income-versus-expense summaries so unusual movement is easier to spot.
charts.expenseBreakdownDescription: Click a slice to link the detail list below.
charts.expenseBreakdownEmptyDescription: Add a few expense records first and the category mix will start to show changes in structure.
charts.trendDescription: Track changes in spending over time and spot unusual spending days quickly.
charts.trendEmptyDescription: There is not enough expense data to draw a trend yet. Add some records and it will appear automatically.
charts.summaryDescription: Switch between yearly, monthly, and daily views to compare how income and expense move over time.
charts.timeSummaryEmptyDescription: There is not enough data to draw the time summary. Add a few income or expense records first.

edit.dialogDescription: Adjust the amount, category, or date, then save and the detail list will update right away.
edit.recordTypeDescription: Changing the type clears the current category so you can choose again.
edit.amountHint: Make sure the amount matches the selected type before saving.
edit.dateHint: Used for chart summaries and sorting in the detail list.
edit.categoryDescription: Pick a new category from the categories available for this type.
edit.categoryEmpty: There are no categories for this type yet. Close the dialog and add one first.
edit.categoryUnavailable: There are no selectable categories right now. Close the dialog, add the matching category, then edit this record again.
edit.notePlaceholder: Add more background for this record, such as the spending context or payee.

categoryDialog.description: Start with a name, then choose an icon and colour so the category is easier to recognise in lists and charts.
categoryDialog.namePlaceholder: For example: Meals, commute, salary, bonus
categoryDialog.nameHint: The name appears directly in detail lists and chart legends.
categoryDialog.iconDescription: Choose an icon that matches the scenario so it stays easier to scan later.
categoryDialog.colorDescription: Colour is used in category buttons and visual accents only. It does not affect the data model.
categoryDialog.incompleteWarning: Please complete the category before saving

messages.deleteRecordDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this record?
messages.categoryPermission: Your current role can view categories only. Owner or admin access is required to manage them.
messages.categoryRefreshWarning: The category was created, but the list could not be refreshed. Please refresh manually.

search.title: Record search
search.description: Search records inside the current ledger by keyword, category, date, and member. If a new record does not appear immediately, refresh again in a moment.
search.notice: If you have just created, updated, or deleted a record, search results may update slightly later. Refresh once first; it does not mean the record is lost.
search.resultDescription: Results only show records from the current ledger. Keep narrowing the result with keywords, categories, dates, types, and members.

summary.bestMatchHint: Closest match score for the current search

filters.title: Search filters
filters.description: Enter a keyword directly or combine member, category, date, and type filters. Without a keyword, filters alone still return results.

states.ledgerRequiredDescription: Search works in ledger context. Switch to the target ledger in Ledger Centre before continuing.
states.loadingDescription: Keyword and filter conditions are being queried together.

empty.idleDescription: Enter a keyword or combine member, category, date, and type filters directly.
empty.filteredDescription: Try widening the date range, clearing category filters, or trying again shortly.
empty.ledgerTitle: No searchable records in this ledger yet
empty.ledgerDescription: Create a record first, or add a keyword to narrow the scope and try again.

errors.invalidDateRange: End date cannot be earlier than the start date

categories.title: Category management
categories.description: Manage income and expense categories for the current ledger in one place. Editing and finer permission states will be added next.
categories.workspaceDescription: Categories now run in the current ledger context. Role differences between owner/admin and member will continue to be refined.

states.ledgerRequiredDescription: Category management is ledger-based now. Choose the target ledger before managing income and expense categories.
states.readOnlyDescription: You can still review the category structure for this ledger, but only owners or admins can add or delete categories.

expense.title: Expense categories
expense.description: Used for records, filters, and chart grouping in this ledger.
expense.emptyDescription: Create a few high-frequency categories first to make quick entry smoother.

income.title: Income categories
income.description: Manage salary, bonus, reimbursement, and other income sources in one place.
income.emptyDescription: Add a few income types to make the statistics view clearer.

budgets.title: Budget centre
budgets.description: Budgets have been split out from the accounting homepage and now track monthly plans, usage progress, and alert thresholds for the current ledger.
budgets.workspaceDescription: This budget list now runs in ledger context, and notifications plus statistics will reuse the rule state shown here.

summary.alertsHint: Budgets with overruns or triggered thresholds

form.title: Create budget
form.description: A budget is bound to the current ledger and month. Leave category empty for a ledger-wide total budget.
form.readOnlyHint: Your current role can view budgets but cannot create, delete, or update threshold rules. Owner or admin access is required.
form.categoryPlaceholder: Leave empty for a ledger-wide budget
form.notesPlaceholder: Use notes to explain the budget purpose, scope, or spending to watch closely this month.

states.ledgerRequiredDescription: Budgets now run in ledger context. Choose the current ledger in Ledger Centre before continuing.
states.loadingDescription: The budget list and category options are being refreshed together.
states.emptyTitle: No budgets for this month yet
states.emptyDescription: Use the form on the right to create the first budget. Rules and notifications will build on it from here.

rules.title: Alert rules
rules.description: Backend notifications and budget hit state are driven by these thresholds.
rules.empty: No alert rules yet. Start with an 80% or 100% threshold.

ruleDialog.title: Add budget alert rule
ruleDialog.description: When budget usage reaches the selected threshold, the backend sends the hit state back into notifications and budget progress.
ruleDialog.notificationTitlePlaceholder: For example: Dining budget is almost used up
ruleDialog.notificationMessagePlaceholder: For example: This month's dining budget has reached 80%. Keep a close eye on spending over the next few days.
ruleDialog.incompleteWarning: Please complete the budget rule first

errors.formIncomplete: Please complete the budget name and amount
errors.deletePermission: Your current role cannot delete budgets
errors.ruleCreatePermission: Your current role cannot add budget rules
errors.ruleCreateFailed: Failed to create the budget rule
errors.ruleDeletePermission: Your current role cannot delete budget rules
errors.ruleDeleteFailed: Failed to delete the budget rule

notifications.title: Notification centre
notifications.description: Notifications now move beyond top-bar toasts into a searchable, traceable history centre for budget alerts, export updates, and system events.

summary.streamHint: Top bar state stays in sync with this page

list.title: My notifications
list.description: SSE handles realtime updates while notification logs handle history and read state. Filters also affect the scope of “mark all as read”.

states.streamUnavailableTitle: Realtime notifications are unavailable right now
states.loadingDescription: Refreshing both the filtered list and unread counts.
states.emptyDescription: Budget alerts, completed exports, and system messages will all settle here.

connection.reconnecting: The notification stream is reconnecting. History is still available, but new realtime messages may be slightly delayed.
connection.connecting: The notification stream is connecting. If the list loads, wait a few seconds for realtime updates to recover.
connection.error: The notification stream is currently offline. Refresh again shortly or check your network. Historical notifications are safe.
connection.idle: The notification stream has not connected yet. Historical notifications are still available here.

messages.noUnread: There are no unread notifications in the current filter
messages.markedFilteredRead: Updated notification state for the current filter

errors.markReadFailed: Failed to mark the notification as read
errors.markAllReadFailed: Failed to mark filtered notifications as read

common.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
common.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action
common.not_found: The requested resource was not found
common.conflict: The request conflicts with the current state
common.network_error: Network request failed. Please check your connection.
common.config_error: The request could not be sent

auth.invalid_credentials: The username or password is incorrect

record.type_mismatch: The record type must match the selected category type

invite.already_member: The invited email already belongs to a member of this ledger
invite.email_mismatch: The signed-in email does not match the invited email

budget.duplicate_budget: A budget already exists for the same month, type, and category scope

export.job_not_ready: The export job is not ready yet

defaults.title: New notification
defaults.message: You have a new platform update.

threshold_cleared.title: Budget back in range
threshold_cleared.message: Budget “{budgetName}” is now back below the alert threshold.

job_queued.title: Export queued
job_queued.message: Your export job has been queued. You will be notified when it is ready.

job_ready.title: Export ready
job_ready.message: The export file “{fileName}” is ready to download.

job_failed.title: Export failed
job_failed.message: The export job could not be completed. Please try again later.

invite_received.title: New invite
invite_received.message: You have been invited to join ledger “{ledgerName}”.

invite_accepted.title: Invite accepted
invite_accepted.message: A member accepted the invite for ledger “{ledgerName}”.

balance_warning.title: Balance alert
balance_warning.message: The current ledger balance has moved sharply. Review the latest records.
